programme.desc: This week, we reflect on a tragic and sad memory in our lives as we remember a dear childhood friend of my son Nick, Nathan Wimsatt. Our families have been close for man years and shared a lot of time together around the soccer field, vacations, fishing trips, and much more. Nathan passed in a tragic car accident at only 18 years on April 29th, 2023. This week his Dad Brian is joining me on Lake Taylorsville where we'll share some memories and celebrate Nathan's life...that ended way to soon!

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Richard Myers is a versatile offensive lineman with an exceptional work ethic, already college football material. The challenge? He’s from a small Indiana town and struggles to get noticed by recruiters. Join Coach Jesse and Richard as they bond over fishing and an old-fashioned Indiana demolition derby, discussing strategies to build Richard’s football future with Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: With over 30 scholarship offers and a place in his high school’s Hall of Fame, Mario Eugenio embodies the rewards of hard work and dedication. But what happens when plans go awry? Find out as Country Ball follows his story.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: The first episode of The Big Reveal kicks off with a bang or rather, a jolt, as Compliant Technologies premieres their newest gadget for pioneering the safety of police officers and civilians alike. Next, Kevin Harrington meets with two individuals that Unlock Math for children around the world. Later, Sheriff Mark Lamb sits down with Bonnie from Off Duty Police Officers for a look at her streamlining systems.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: The Big Reveal does it again by bringing three very different entrepreneurs together, all connected by their pioneer spirit. Flag Guard tips off this episode by explaining how they’re doing their part in keeping your loved ones safe. After that, Dr. West explains how his revolutionary probiotic will fix your digestive health 100% of the time. Host Kevin Harrington then caps off this episode in style with a trip to Tommasina Eyewear’s studio with a peak behind the curtain.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: S1E1 Animals
programme.desc: GoPro Animals delivers heartwarming, hilarious, and jaw-dropping moments from the animal world. From Golden Retrievers, French Bulldogs, and Border Collies bringing endless puppy smiles, to rescuing orcas and swimming with humpback whales, this show has it all. Wildlife photographer Chris Barnard captures the wild up close, even surviving a giraffe’s mighty kick. Plus, join Ocean Conservation Namibia as they race to save seals trapped in deadly ocean debris. A must-watch for every animal lover.

programme.title: S1E1 Skate
programme.desc: This episode features the inspiring story of founders Miguel and Isabel. Driven by the belief that kids should be free to just be kids, #GoProForACause partner SanSkate is making a real difference in their community. Their mission is to provide a safe space for children who enter the workforce at a young age, giving them a chance to set aside their struggles and enjoy skateboarding. The episode also showcases the very best of GoPro skateboarding, featuring incredible talent from Andrew Brophy, Sewa Kroetkov, Madars Apse, and more.

programme.title: S1E2 Skate
programme.desc: Watch the inspiring story of Mike Rogers, an all-around skateboarding star from Cocoa Beach, FL. A regular competitor at top events around the world, including the Vans Pro-Tec Pool Party, Vans Bowl-A-Rama at Bondi Beach, and the Clash at Clairemont, Mike showcases his skill, style, and dedication to the sport. The episode also features Leticia Bufoni and Cata Diaz as she shares her perspective on women in skateboarding and explains why MACBA in Barcelona has become a world-renowned destination for skaters, with its iconic plaza, unique architecture, and perfectly smooth concrete.

programme.title: Law of the Lash
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal sets out to capture a notorious outlaw gang, confronting corruption and danger as he fights to bring justice to the frontier

programme.title: The Squaw Man (1931)
programme.desc: An English aristocrat accused of a crime he did not commit flees to the American West, where he starts a new life and falls in love with a Native American woman. As he builds a future on the frontier, his past returns to threaten the family he has created, forcing him to face difficult choices between honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies (1937)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy heads to the Rockies where he becomes involved in a dispute between ranchers and troublemakers threatening the peace of the region. With courage, quick thinking, and a few songs along the way, he works to restore order and protect those in danger.

programme.title: Songs and Saddles (1938)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy becomes involved in a range dispute when a group of outlaws tries to force settlers off their land. Using his musical charm and sharpshooting skills, he works to protect the innocent and bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: Son of the Renegade, 1942
programme.desc: The son of a notorious outlaw grows up unaware of his father’s criminal past. As he comes of age, he is drawn into a conflict between lawmen and outlaws, forcing him to confront the truth about his heritage. Struggling between loyalty and justice, he must decide whether to follow in his father’s footsteps or forge his own path on the side of the law.

programme.title: Raiders of Red Gap 1943
programme.desc: In Raiders of Red Gap, the Range Busters ride into action when a ruthless gang plots to seize control of a frontier town. Crash Corrigan, Dusty King, and Alibi Terhune team up to outwit the outlaws with fast guns, daring stunts, and plenty of grit. With danger around every corner—and a touch of Alibi’s trademark humor—this action-packed Western gallops straight into classic Range Busters territory.

programme.title: The Gabby Hayes Show - Muscles
programme.desc: Dramatizing the lives of historical figures, such as the naval commander, the lawman and professional gambler, and the outlaw Belle, tall tales and Western scenes

programme.title: The Brand of Hate
programme.desc: Trouble starts when Bill Larkins and his two sons move in with his brother Joe. They start rustling cattle and then kill Rod's father with Joe's gun. The Sheriff and Rod think they did it and are after proof.

programme.title: Django, Kill!
programme.desc: Various factions, including a half-breed bandit, a gang of homosexual cowboys, and a priest, feud over stolen gold in a surreal town.

programme.title: Romance on the Range 1942
programme.desc: Roy Rogers brings song and spirit to Romance on the Range! When cattle rustlers stir up trouble on the frontier, Roy saddles up to protect the ranchers and bring the outlaws to justice. Along the way, his courage and charm win more than just gunfights, as romance blossoms under the wide-open skies. With the Sons of the Pioneers providing harmony and plenty of action on the trail, this Western blends music, adventure, and heart in true Roy Rogers style.
